title: Robust Roasted Greek Sirloin Steak Tips Tzatziki
description: A fresh and crispy solo dinner Greek dish featuring sirloin steak tips, confit tomato, and tzatziki sauce, served on a lazy Susan spinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, salt, and pepper, then add the sirloin steak tips and toss to coat.
Spread the steak tips on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 15 minutes, or until browned.
While the steak is cooking, prepare the tzatziki sauce by combining the yogurt, cucumber, garlic, and dill in a bowl.
Stir the tzatziki sauce well and refrigerate until ready to serve.
To prepare the confit tomatoes, cut them in half and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the tomatoes with olive oil and roast in the oven for 20 minutes, or until tender.
To serve, place the roasted steak tips on a lazy Susan spinner, top with confit tomatoes and a dollop of tzatziki sauce.
